rationale.R1.5: The delegation explicitly and entirely targets section ordering and narrative arc. The artifact is visibly disordered — the contribution claim (value-of-information gating rule) appears after the results it explains, and related work is embedded between methods and results rather than preceding them. Proposing a corrected section sequence is the sole load-bearing responsibility; failure to produce a coherent reordering invalidates the delegation.
